Added_Other.name: DFFlagDataStoreEnableModernRequestCounters_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Activates modern request counting for data stores with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management and tracking for developers, leading to better game stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a limit on how many requests can be made to data stores for ordered lists.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and stability when accessing player data, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests a player can make to the data store, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data for all players, preventing any single player from overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on data store requests for better performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data retrieval speed, enhancing gameplay experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player to manage server load.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing any single player from overwhelming the server with too many requests.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store requests can be made when removing ordered data.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by allowing more efficient data management for games with many players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store removal requests per player based on the game universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by managing data store usage more effectively.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of ordered write requests for data stores in a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smooth data writing processes, reducing lag and improving game performance for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a cap on how many write requests a player can make to data stores.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents server overload and ensures fair access to data for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on data requests for specific game universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by managing data load for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store requests per player based on the universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps maintain game stability by preventing excessive data requests from players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the maximum number of read requests allowed for data stores in a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps manage data access efficiently, preventing slowdowns for players accessing game data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store read requests per player based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing excessive data requests from players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the fixed limit on data store requests for specific universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage data more flexibly without hitting request limits.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a cap on the number of standard data store removal requests per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage resources, preventing abuse and maintaining game stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on data store write requests with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes performance and ensures fair use of data storage across games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store write requests per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing overload and improving stability.

Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the reliability of data collection, leading to better game performance insights.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Dynamically retrieves the Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players always have the latest updates and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates timestamps dynamically in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see accurate and real-time information.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for versioning.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance when checking the version of the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and responsiveness of features that use timestamps.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFCSendPrimaryCompleteSignal_Staged

Removed_Other.purpose: Improves communication between game systems to enhance gameplay feedback.
